name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusionN ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES state, turn

(* State can be "idle", "trying", or "critical" *)
Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ turn \in 1..N

Next == \/ /\ state[i] = "idle"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
          /\ turn' = turn
        \/ /\ state[i] = "trying"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
          /\ turn' = turn
        \/ /\ state[i] = "critical"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]
          /\ turn' = turn

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

name: Two-Phase Commit
Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "hungry"
        /\ forks[i] = 0
        /\ forks[If(i = 1, N, i - 1)] = 0
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 1, ![If(i = 1, N, i - 1)] = 1]
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "eating"
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![If(i = N, 1, i + 1)] = 0]
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "thinking"
        /\ forks' = forks
        /\ states' = states

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ LET maxNum == Max(Seq(num))
                newNum == IF maxNum = 0 THEN 1 ELSE maxNum + 1
            IN /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = newNum]
               /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES queue, head, tail, full, empty

vars == <<queue, head, tail, full, empty>>

Init == /\ queue = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ full = FALSE
        /\ empty = TRUE

Next == 
    \/ /\ full = FALSE
       /\ head = tail
       /\ full' = TRUE
       /\ empty' = FALSE
       /\ queue' = [i \in 1..K |-> IF i = head THEN 1 ELSE queue[i]]
       /\ head' = head
       /\ tail' = tail
    \/ /\ full = FALSE
       /\ head # tail
       /\ full' = FALSE
       /\ empty' = FALSE
       /\ queue' = [i \in 1..K |-> IF i = head THEN 1 ELSE queue[i]]
       /\ head' = head
       /\ tail' = tail
    \/ /\ full = TRUE
       /\ head = tail
       /\ full' = TRUE
       /\ empty' = FALSE
       /\ queue' = [i \in 1..K |-> IF i = head THEN 1 ELSE queue[i]]
       /\ head' = head
       /\ tail' = tail
    \/ /\ full = TRUE
       /\ head # tail
       /\ full' = TRUE
       /\ empty' = FALSE
       /\ queue' = [i \in 1..K |-> IF i = head THEN 1 ELSE queue[i]]
       /\ head' = head
       /\ tail' = tail
    \/ /\ full = FALSE
       /\ head = tail
       /\ full' = FALSE
       /\ empty' = TRUE
       /\ queue' = [i \in 1..K |-> IF i = tail THEN 0 ELSE queue[i]]
       /\ head' = head
       /\ tail' = tail
    \/ /\ full = FALSE
       /\ head # tail
       /\ full' = FALSE
       /\ empty' = TRUE
       /\ queue' = [i \in 1..K |-> IF i = tail THEN 0 ELSE queue[i]]
       /\ head' = head
       /\ tail' = tail
    \/ /\ full = TRUE
       /\ head = tail
       /\ full' = TRUE
       /\ empty' = TRUE
       /\ queue' = [i \in 1..K |-> IF i = tail THEN 0 ELSE queue[i]]
       /\ head' = head
       /\ tail' = tail
    \/ /\ full = TRUE
       /\ head # tail
       /\ full' = TRUE
       /\ empty' = TRUE
       /\ queue' = [i \in 1..K |-> IF i = tail THEN 0 ELSE queue[i]]
       /\ head' = head
       /\ tail' = tail

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS NULL, Server

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

(* State can be "Follower", "Candidate", or "Leader" *)

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = [s \in Server |-> NULL]
        /\ state = [s \in Server |-> "Follower"]

Next == \/ (* Follower *)
            /\ state = [s \in Server |-> "Follower"]
            /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
            /\ votedFor' = votedFor
            /\ state' = state
        \/ (* Candidate *)
            /\ state = [s \in Server |-> "Candidate"]
            /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
            /\ votedFor' = [s \in Server |-> IF s = self THEN self ELSE votedFor[s]]
            /\ state' = state
        \/ (* Leader *)
            /\ state = [s \in Server |-> "Leader"]
            /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
            /\ votedFor' = votedFor
            /\ state' = state

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = 0
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ reader_enter
        /\ readers' = readers + 1
        /\ writer_active' = writer_active
       \/ /\ reader_exit
        /\ readers' = readers - 1
        /\ writer_active' = writer_active
       \/ /\ writer_enter
        /\ writer_active' = TRUE
        /\ readers' = readers
       \/ /\ writer_exit
        /\ writer_active' = FALSE
        /\ readers' = readers

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DistributedSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES N, channels, localState, channelState, snapshotRecorded, markerSent

Init == 
    /\ N = 5
    /\ channels = [i \in 1..N, j \in 1..N |-> {}]
    /\ localState = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
    /\ channelState = [i \in 1..N, j \in 1..N |-> {}]
    /\ snapshotRecorded = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
    /\ markerSent = [i \in 1..N, j \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

SendMarker(i, j) == 
    /\ markerSenti..j = FALSE
    /\ channelsi..j = Append(channelsi..j, "marker")
    /\ markerSent' = [markerSent EXCEPT !i..j = TRUE]

RecordState(i) == 
    /\ snapshotRecorded[i] = FALSE
    /\ localState' = [localState EXCEPT ![i] = localState[i] + 1]
    /\ snapshotRecorded' = [snapshotRecorded EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<channels, channelState, markerSent>>

ReceiveMessage(i, j, msg) == 
    /\ channelsj..i /= {}
    /\ channels' = [channels EXCEPT !j..i = Tail(channelsj..i)]
    /\ IF msg = "marker" THEN
           /\ markerSent' = [markerSent EXCEPT !j..i = TRUE]
           /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT !j..i = channelsj..i]
           /\ UNCHANGED <<localState, snapshotRecorded>>

           /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT !j..i = Append(channelStatej..i, msg)]
           /\ UNCHANGED <<localState, snapshotRecorded, markerSent>>

Next == 
    \E i, j \in 1..N : 
        \/ SendMarker(i, j)
        \/ RecordState(i)
        \/ ReceiveMessage(i, j, Head(channelsj..i))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<N, channels, localState, channelState, snapshotRecorded, markerSent>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES token, message

Init == /\ token \in 1..N
        /\ message = <<>>

Next == /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
        /\ message' = <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, message>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Keys, NULL, Values

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values :
          /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, M \in Nat \ {0} \\
VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen

Init == 
  /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [promised \in Nat, accepted \in Nat]]
  /\ proposers = [i \in 1..M |-> [ballot \in Nat, value \in Nat]]
  /\ chosen = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

Next == 
  /\ \E i \in 1..N : \E j \in 1..M :
    /\ proposers[j].ballot > acceptors[i].promised
    /\ acceptors' = [acceptors EXCEPT ![i] = [promised \in Nat, accepted \in Nat] 
      WITH [promised |-> proposers[j].ballot, accepted |-> proposers[j].value]]
    /\ proposers' = proposers
    /\ chosen' = chosen
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : \E j \in 1..M :
    /\ proposers[j].ballot = acceptors[i].promised
    /\ acceptors' = acceptors
    /\ proposers' = proposers
    /\ chosen' = [chosen EXCEPT ![i] = proposers[j].value]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposers, chosen>>

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE
VARIABLES receivedChunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ file = 0 .. FILE_SIZE - 1
    /\ chunks = [i \in 0 .. Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) - 1 |-> 

            file[i * CHUNK_SIZE .. (i + 1) * CHUNK_SIZE - 1]

            file[i * CHUNK_SIZE .. FILE_SIZE - 1]]
    /\ sentChunks = {}
    /\ receivedChunks = {}
    /\ retransmitCount = [i \in 0 .. Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) - 1 |-> 0]

SendChunk == 
    /\ \E i \in 0 .. Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) - 1 : 
        /\ i \notin sentChunks
        /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks \cup {i}
        /\ receivedChunks' = receivedChunks
        /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
    \/ \E i \in sentChunks : 
        /\ i \notin receivedChunks
        /\ IF Random < 0.5 THEN
            /\ receivedChunks' = receivedChunks \cup {i}
            /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount

            /\ receivedChunks' = receivedChunks
            /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![i] = @ + 1]
        /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks

Next == SendChunk

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sentChunks, receivedChunks, retransmitCount>>

TypeOK == 
    /\ file \in 0 .. FILE_SIZE - 1
    /\ chunks \in [0 .. Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) - 1 -> 0 .. FILE_SIZE - 1]
    /\ sentChunks \subseteq 0 .. Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) - 1
    /\ receivedChunks \subseteq 0 .. Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) - 1
    /\ retransmitCount \in [0 .. Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) - 1 -> 0 .. MAX_RETRIES]   \end{verbatim}

name: Transaction Isolation (Snapshot Isolation)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SnapshotIsolationDB ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Req, TxReq, Txns

VARIABLES db, txns, nextTxId, readSet, status, writeSet


  txns = <<>>; (* sequence of transactions *)
  nextTxId = 0; (* next transaction id *)

  loop
    select
      case
        when newTxReq -> beginTx()
        when readReq -> read()
        when writeReq -> write()
        when commitReq -> commit()
        when abortReq -> abort()
      end
  end
end
*)

(* Transaction record: <<id, startTs, status, readSet, writeSet>> *)
TxId == [id: Nat, startTs: Nat, status: {"active", "committed", "aborted"}, readSet: FiniteSet, writeSet: FiniteSet]
Tx == [id: Nat, startTs: Nat, status: {"active", "committed", "aborted"}, readSet: FiniteSet, writeSet: FiniteSet]
Txs == Seq(Tx)

(* Record: sequence of values *)
Record == Seq(Nat)
Records == Seq(Record)

(* Transaction status *)
Active == "active"
Committed == "committed"
Aborted == "aborted"

(* Transaction operations *)
BeginTx == [id |-> nextTxId, startTs |-> Len(db), status |-> Active, readSet |-> {}, writeSet |-> {}]
CommitTx == [id |-> tx.id, startTs |-> tx.startTs, status |-> Committed, readSet |-> tx.readSet, writeSet |-> tx.writeSet]
AbortTx == [id |-> tx.id, startTs |-> tx.startTs, status |-> Aborted, readSet |-> tx.readSet, writeSet |-> tx.writeSet]

(* Transaction actions *)
BeginTxAction == 
  /\ nextTxId' = nextTxId + 1
  /\ txns' = Append(txns, BeginTx)

CommitTxAction(tx) == 
  /\ tx.status' = Committed
  /\ txns' = Subst(txns, tx.id, CommitTx)

AbortTxAction(tx) == 
  /\ tx.status' = Aborted
  /\ txns' = Subst(txns, tx.id, AbortTx)

(* Read operation *)
Read(tx, recordId, fieldId) == 
  /\ recordId < Len(db)
  /\ fieldId < Len(db[recordId])
  /\ tx.readSet' = tx.readSet \cup {recordId}
  /\ txns' = Subst(txns, tx.id, tx)

(* Write operation *)
Write(tx, recordId, fieldId, value) == 
  /\ recordId < Len(db)
  /\ fieldId < Len(db[recordId])
  /\ tx.writeSet' = tx.writeSet \cup {recordId}
  /\ txns' = Subst(txns, tx.id, tx)

(* Commit operation *)
Commit(tx) == 
  /\ tx.status = Active
  /\ \A r \in tx.writeSet: db[r] = db[r] \ {db[r][fieldId] |-> value}
  /\ CommitTxAction(tx)

(* Abort operation *)
Abort(tx) == 
  /\ tx.status = Active
  /\ AbortTxAction(tx)

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
  /\ db = <<>>
  /\ txns = <<>>
  /\ nextTxId = 0

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
  \/ \E tx \in txns: tx.status = Active /\ Read(tx, recordId, fieldId)
  \/ \E tx \in txns: tx.status = Active /\ Write(tx, recordId, fieldId, value)
  \/ \E tx \in txns: tx.status = Active /\ Commit(tx)
  \/ \E tx \in txns: tx.status = Active /\ Abort(tx)

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<db, txns, nextTxId>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ db \in Records
  /\ txns \in Txns
  /\ nextTxId \in Nat

====

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES clocks, offsets

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

Next == /\ \A i \in 1..N: offsets[i] = 0
        /\ \A i \in 1..N: clocks[i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]
        /\ \A i \in 1..N: offsets[i] = 0
        /\ \A i \in 1..N: offsets[i] = offsets[i] + (RandomOffset - offsets[i]) \div N

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets>>

TypeOK == /\ clocks \in [1..N -> Int]
          /\ offsets \in [1..N -> Int]

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = TRUE]
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
          /\ turn' = turn
        \/ /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = TRUE]
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
          /\ turn' = turn

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Gossip ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, known
VARIABLES infected


vars == << infected >>

Init == /\ infected = [i \in 1..N |-> known[i] = {}]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ infected' = [infected EXCEPT ![i] = infected[i] \cup \{j \in 1..N : j \in known[i] \land j \notin infected[i]\}]
          /\ \A j \in 1..N \setminus {i} : infected'[j] = infected[j]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ vars \in [1..N -> SUBSET 1..N]
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : known[i] \subseteq 1..N

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Client, Pages

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init == /\ free = {1..N}
        /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Client : \E p \in free :
          /\ free' = free \ {p}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
        \/ \E c \in Client : \E p \in allocated[c] :
          /\ free' = free \cup {p}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {p}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
          /\ allocated \in [Client -> SUBSET Pages]

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Message, SubscriberId, TopicId

VARIABLES subscribers, messages

(* TypeOK ensures that subscribers is a function from subscriber IDs to sets of topics,
   and messages is a function from topic IDs to sequences of messages. *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ subscribers \in [SubscriberId -> SUBSET TopicId]
    /\ messages \in [TopicId -> Seq(Message)]

(* Init sets up an empty broker with no subscribers and no messages. *)
Init == 
    /\ subscribers = [s \in SubscriberId |-> {}]
    /\ messages = [t \in TopicId |-> <<>>]

(* Next describes the possible actions that can occur in the system. *)
Next == 
    \/ (* A subscriber registers interest in a topic. *)
        /\ \E s \in SubscriberId : \E t \in TopicId :
            /\ subscribers' = [subscribers EXCEPT ![s] = subscribers[s] \cup {t}]
            /\ messages' = messages
    \/ (* A publisher posts a message on a topic. *)
        /\ \E t \in TopicId : \E m \in Message :
            /\ subscribers' = subscribers
            /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![t] = Append(messages[t], m)]

(* Spec defines the overall behavior of the system as starting from Init and following Next. *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<subscribers, messages>>

====

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn = 0
        /\ wants = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]

Next == \/ /\ wants[1] = FALSE
          /\ wants[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ wants' = wants
        \/ /\ wants[1] = FALSE
          /\ wants[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ wants[1] = TRUE
          /\ wants[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ wants[1] = TRUE
          /\ wants[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ wants' = wants

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

====

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Node

VARIABLES counts

Init == /\ counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]

Next == /\ \E n \in Node :
          /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [m \in Node |-> counts[n][m] + 1]]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<counts>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>
